message:
style(fsfs): apply rustfmt formatting to release asset URL builders and tests

Formatting-only changes applied by rustfmt:
- Expand inline if-else for Windows extension detection to multi-line
- Collapse single-expression format! for checksum URL to one line
- Expand inline eprintln string to multi-line format
- Remove unnecessary line breaks in test assertions

No logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
